items.text:
CASTING CALL in HOUSTON
ANARKALI REIMAGINED

A Dreamers HTX Production

Following its sold-out world premiere, Anarkali Reimagined returns to the stage this October, and Dreamers HTX is seeking two actors for featured roles in the remount.

Set in the court of Emperor Akbar, Anarkali Reimagined is an original historical drama that reimagines one of South Asia's most enduring legends through politics, power, and the women history almost forgot.

Performance Dates

October 22–25, 2026

Luxtrium | Houston, Texas

Rehearsals Begin

August 12, 2026

Compensation

This is currently an unpaid production.

Eligibility

 Ages 18–30

 Open to all ethnicities

 Self-tape auditions only

 Featured Roles

LADY YASAMIN

A scholar from the Persian city of Isfahan, Lady Yasamin arrives in Emperor Akbar's court as part of a proposed marriage alliance for Prince Salim.

She is quietly brilliant, deeply educated, and impossible to rattle. Yasamin listens more than she speaks, notices what others miss, and delivers her observations with understated precision. Her calm intelligence gradually makes her indispensable to the political intrigue unfolding around her.

Seeking an actor with exceptional stage presence who can command attention through restraint, subtlety, and dry wit rather than volume.

LADY MEHRANGIZ

A skilled negotiator from a prominent trading family in Khorasan, Lady Mehrangiz comes to court as part of the same marriage alliance.

Warm, charismatic, and politically astute, she understands that diplomacy is often more powerful than force. She can settle a generations-old dispute over tea—and leave having secured exactly what she wanted. Every conversation is a negotiation, and every negotiation feels effortless.

Seeking an actor comfortable with quick, intelligent dialogue, sharp timing, and charm that conceals strategic calculation.

To Audition

Email us to request the audition sides. Once received, submit:

A 1–2 minute self-tape using the provided sides

A brief slate with your name, age range, and location

Deadline: July 20th 

Email: info@dreamershtx.com

We look forward to discovering new artists to join the next chapter of *Anarkali Reimagined

A brief slate with your name, age range, and location

Deadline: July 20th 

Email: info@dreamershtx.com

We look forward to discovering new artists to join the next chapter of *Anarkali Reimagined

items.text:
Casting Call for Dear Sister Margaret. A feature film which is a thriller with horror elements. A nun is asked to make a house call to offer spiritual guidance and ends up being forced to make decisions which could change the future of all humanity.

LOCATION: Milton Keynes, surrounding areas in Buckinghamshire/Bedfordshire

CASTING REQUIREMENTS: 
Charlotte Sinclair: She is early-mid 40s-50s. Would prefer actress with darker hair and posh English accent. She exudes confidence and is always in control of a room, being 2 steps ahead of everyone else, like a cat toying with its prey. She is married to Hugh Sinclair.

Hugh Sinclair - married to Charlotte. He is early-mid 40s-50s. He comes from an archaeological background, and dressed like a stereotypical professor (think tweed and elbow patches). He has quite a nervous disposition and can be prone to hysterical outbursts, much to the disdain of his wife, Charlotte.

Dates: Ideally September, October. To be confirmed when fully cast.

Payment: Unpaid project, expenses will be covered for food, travel, accommodation.

Please email filmzoid@gmail.com if interested.

topComments.text: Sounds very interesting my playing age is 50-65. Is this a feature length or short film.

Looking for new opportunities!
Dear friends,

I am currently looking for work as a professional ballet dancer.

If you know of any theatres, dance companies, event agencies, show productions, opera houses, cruise productions, or other projects looking for a ballerina, I would be very grateful for any recommendations or contacts.

I am a professional ballet and contemporary dancer, open to performances, productions, events, and creative collaborations.

Please feel free to message me or share this post. Thank you so much! 🤍

items.text:
🎬 Premiering October 4 at Syracuse International Film Festival! 🎬

✨ "Angry Girl Apartment" is an abrasive multi-digital-media visual music film that follows two girls navigating apartment disasters as they come up. When frustration builds, they must decide where to direct their energy. 

🎶 A rhythmic, animated exploration of girlhood, play, and chaos.

🌟 Director Biography: Corine is a Montreal-based filmmaker and animator inspired by the rhythm of music and the drawn image. A recent Film Animation graduate, she aims to tell stories through her unique animation style.

🗓️ Join us on October 4 for a special screening during the 23rd anniversary of Syracuse International Film Festival's 35mm to Digital Animation Day!
Don't miss it! 🎥✨ 

#Animation #AnimationArtists #syracuseny #viralreelschallenge #trendingnow #capcut #syracuseinternationalfilmfestival #23yearsstrong #october #ThingsToDo #funnyreels

items.summary:
🎬 Premiering October 4 at Syracuse International Film Festival! 🎬

✨ "Angry Girl Apartment" is an abrasive multi-digital-media visual music film that follows two girls navigating apartment disasters as they come up. When frustration builds, they must decide where to direct their energy. 

🎶 A rhythmic, animated exploration of girlhood, play, and chaos.

🌟 Director Biography: Corine is a Montreal-based filmmaker and animator inspired by the rhythm of music and the drawn image. A recent Film Animation graduate, she aims to tell stories through her unique animation style.

🗓️ Join us on October 4 for a special screening during the 23rd anniversary of Syracuse International Film Festival's 35mm to Digital Animation Day!
Don't miss it! 🎥✨ 

#Animation #AnimationArtists #syracuseny #viralreelschallenge #trendingnow #capcut #syracuseinternationalfilmfestival #23yearsstrong #october #ThingsToDo #funnyreels
items.title: 🎬 Premiering October 4 at Syracuse International Film Festival! 🎬

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is now casting a FEMALE STAND-IN for the Feature Film 'DRIFTER.' 

This project will be taking place in the Northeast, OH area.

Please read carefully below for details.

DETAILS:

Project: Feature Film 'DRIFTER'

Filming Location: Northeast, OH area

Shoot Dates:  Approximately 8 days during the shoot spread of July 15th through July 24th 2026.

*These dates are subject to change, so please only submit if you are FULLY AVAILABLE for ALL DATES with flexibility.*

Stand-In Rate: $128 for 8 hours

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Stand-In

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White

Age: 18+

Height: 5'5" - 5'7"

Weight: 100lbs - 120lbs

HOW TO SUBMIT:
In order to submit for this role, please send an email to team@angelaboehmcasting.com with the following information:

SUBJECT LINE: DRIFTER Female Stand-In - (YOUR FULL NAME)

PLEASE INCLUDE:

- Full Name

- Height

- Weight

- Phone Number

- 1 CURRENT Waist-Up or Headshot Photo

- 1 CURRENT Full-Body Photo

- Let us know of any past film or stand-in experience.

- Any conflicts on/around the shoot spread of July 15th through July 24th 2026.

***PLEASE REMEMBER: These dates are tentative and subject to change, so please only submit if you are FULLY AVAILABLE for ALL DATES with flexibility.***

PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting
